hint.load_current: Try to load project file for current video file, or try to stabilize that video file directly
hint.browse: Browse for the Gyroflow(Niyien) project file
hint.load_lens: Browse for the lens profile or a preset
hint.open_recent_project: Load most recently saved project in the Gyroflow(Niyien) app
hint.video_speed: Use this slider to change video speed or keyframe it, instead of built-in speed changes in the editor
hint.disable_stretch: If you used Input stretch in the lens profile in Gyroflow(Niyien), and you de-stretched the video separately in your editor (by setting anamorphic squeeze factor), check this to disable Gyroflow(Niyien)'s internal stretching.
hint.zoom_mode: How adaptive zoom is computed during stabilization
hint.use_gyroflows_keyframes: Use internal Gyroflow(Niyien)'s keyframes, instead of the editor ones.
hint.stabilization_speed_ramp: When you speed ramp the clip, let Gyroflow adjust the stabilization amount to the video speed.
hint.recalculate_keyframes: Recalculate keyframes after adjusting the splines (in Fusion mode)
hint.output_size_to_timeline: Set the output size to the timeline dimensions
hint.toggle_overview: Zooms out the view to see the stabilization results. Disable this before rendering.
hint.dont_draw_outside: When clip and timeline aspect ratio don't match, draw the final image inside the source clip, instead of drawing outside it.
hint.include_project_data: If you intend to share the project to someone else, the plugin can embed the Gyroflow project data including gyro data inside the video editor project. This way you don't have to share .gyroflow project files. Enabling this option will make the project bigger.
status.timeline_fps_mismatch_hint: Timeline frame rate doesn't match the clip frame rate! Use the plugin in Fusion instead
status.not_synced_hint: Gyro data is not synced with the video, open the video in Gyroflow(Niyien) and add sync points (eg. by doing autosync)
dialog.gyroflow_not_found: Unable to find Gyroflow(Niyien) app path. Make sure to run Gyroflow(Niyien) app at least once.
ofx.plugin.label: Gyroflow(Niyien)
ae.msg.footage_not_found:
Unable to find the footage path.
Use the "Browse" button and load the project file or a video file.
